name: Meri Shop Cat Wagging Fish Realistic Plush Toy Simulation Catnip Gift Style_B
description: Description:Made of PP cotton and short plush, it's soft and will not do harm to cats paws.The simulation fish toy looks like real fish, it will make a lot of fun between you and your cat.Stuffed with catmint that can make your cat excited and relieve your cat's mood and stress, a good choice for your pet.This vivid fish toy will bring your cat a lot of pleasure and feel less lonely when you are not at home.Good choice for pet owners and can enhance the relationship between you and your pet.Specification:Item Type: Pet ToyMaterial: Cotton + Plush + CatmintLength: approx.20cm/7.87 inchPackage I
